sizing_rule.note: Optimal f sizing: 1 contract per $10,000 equity (10% base). For multi-system portfolios, allocate capital percentages across systems (e.g., 10/20/70 split) and calculate net HPR as sum of (System HPR × Allocation %). Uses fixed fractional approach across multiple systems.

source_rule_text: Position size should be 1 contract per every $10,000 in account equity based on optimal f, adjusted across multiple systems using fixed fractional trading with percentage allocations.
